title: Timetable and Prices
metaDescription: Historical Yoga timetable and fees from Patricia Smith's teaching years (archived). Yoga classes are no longer offered.

blocks.text: Historical archive — Yoga classes no longer offered

blocks.html: Community and private Yoga sessions ended when Patricia paused teaching in 2021 to focus on Touch for Health Kinesiology and Nutrition. The information below is kept for historical reference only and is not a current offer.

blocks.text: Former prices (as published at the time)

blocks.html:
PRIVATE YOGA CLASS – ONE STUDENT – 90 MINUTES$100
10 x CONCESSION CARD FOR PRIVATE CLASSES, VALID FOR 6 MONTHS10 % DISCOUNT OF TOTAL PRICE
For current Kinesiology and Nutrition sessions, see sessions and cost or book online.
